      SMTTerm addGuardIfNecessary(SMTTerm t)
      Adds a guard for the given term if that term may overflow.

      Creates guards for the given terms

      Recursively adds overflow guards for non ground terms if necessary.

      Searches for arithmetical ground terms in sub and stores them in terms

    • Method Detail

      • createGuards

        public java.util.List<SMTTerm> createGuards(java.util.Set<SMTTerm> terms)
        Creates guards for the given terms
        Parameters:
        terms - - the terms that must be guarded against integer overflows
        Returns:
        a list of generated guards

      • addGuardIfNecessary

        public SMTTerm addGuardIfNecessary(SMTTerm t)
        Adds a guard for the given term if that term may overflow.
        Parameters:
        t -
        Returns:

      • processTerm

        public void processTerm(SMTTerm t)
        Recursively adds overflow guards for non ground terms if necessary.
        Parameters:
        t -

      • searchArithTerms

        public void searchArithTerms(java.util.Set<SMTTerm> terms,
                             SMTTerm sub,
                             java.util.Set<SMTTermVariable> universalVars,
                             java.util.Set<SMTTermVariable> existentialVars,
                             java.util.List<SMTTermVariable> bind)
        Searches for non ground terms in sub, and stores them in terms. Begin with empty lists.
        Parameters:
        terms - list where the terms are stored
        sub - the term to be searched
        universalVars - universal variables
        existentialVars - existential variables
        bind - variables bounded by the current quantifier

      • searchArithGroundTerms

        public void searchArithGroundTerms(java.util.Set<SMTTerm> terms,
                                   SMTTerm sub)
        Searches for arithmetical ground terms in sub and stores them in terms
        Parameters:
        terms -
        sub -
